title: So Evil My Love
writer: Ronald Millar, Joseph Shearing, Leonard Spigelgass
actors: Ray Milland, Ann Todd, Geraldine Fitzgerald
plot: Olivia Harwood, missionary's widow, meets charming Mark Bellis, artist and rogue, on the ship taking them both back to 1890s London. After Olivia opens a lodging house, Mark becomes her lodger then her lover. Olivia falls so compl...
